headlines.description: — If misery loves company, the Jacksonville Jaguars made sure they have just that at the bottom of the AFC South.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jaguars score final 10 points, end Titans' slim playoff hopes with 10-6 win

events.name: New York Jets at Miami Dolphins

headlines.description: — Tua Tagovailoa wouldn't want to repeat everything that was said in the Miami Dolphins' huddle Sunday when they trailed the New York Jets in the fourth quarter.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets

headlines.description: — Sam Darnold tossed aside his stoic demeanor for a moment after realizing he was on the videoboard, aggressively twirling a towel to further stoke the crowd's fire after the Minnesota Vikings had...
headlines.shortLinkText: Darnold delivers for Vikings with career-high 347 yards and 5 TDs to beat Falcons, Cousins 42-21

events.name: New Orleans Saints at New York Giants

headlines.description: — The New Orleans Saints took two leaps against the New York Giants. One by defensive tackle Bryan Bresee saved a much-needed win. The other by quarterback Derek Carr may have damaged their already slim chances of winning the NFC South.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bresee blocks potential tying FG and Saints hold on to beat Giants 14-11 after Carr is injured

headlines.description: — The mood in the Eagles' locker room was a bit more bleak than it should have been for a team riding a nine-game winning streak and celebrating a franchise rushing record.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barkley's brilliance helps Eagles beat Panthers 22-16 but pass game has Philly frustrated

headlines.description: — Cam Heyward has been on good teams before. Ones that have captured divisions. Ones that have won playoff games, though admittedly not in a while.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wilson throws for 2 touchdowns as Steelers cruise past mistake-prone Browns 27-14

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — The surging Tampa Bay Buccaneers are back over .500, a fourth straight NFC South title within reach.
headlines.shortLinkText: Baker Mayfield throws for 3 TDs, Bucs take over 1st in NFC South with 28-13 win over Raiders

headlines.description: — On a play that didn't particularly matter in the final seconds of the fourth quarter, Seattle's defense was swarming anyway, chasing Arizona's Kyler Murray across the field before the quarterback dejectedly slid to the ground for a sack as the clock...
headlines.shortLinkText: Charbonnet runs for career-high 134 yards, 2 TDs as NFC West-leading Seahawks beat Cardinals 30-18

events.name: Buffalo Bills at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Matthew Stafford and the Los Angeles Rams had to pile up a veritable mountain of points, yards and time-of-possession advantage early on to give themselves even a chance against the Buffalo Bills' ferocious fourth-quarter rally and a historic...
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen sets NFL mark with 3 TD passes and 3 TD runs, but Stafford's Rams hold off Bills 44-42

headlines.description: — After weeks of shaky play, the San Francisco 49ers got back to their old form with one of the most dominant first halves in years.
headlines.shortLinkText: 49ers beat the Bears 38-13 to spoil Thomas Brown's coaching debut

events.name: Los Angeles Chargers at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Andy Reid doesn't need to schedule a stress test anytime soon. He seems to get one every week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs win 9th straight AFC West title, beating Chargers 19-17 on bank-shot field goal
